name: Cooked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds chicken breasts or parts (up to 3 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a Crock-Pot.
2. Cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours, or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
3. Remove chicken from the cooking liquid and debone if necessary.
4. Discard the bay leaf.
5. Chop the chicken meat for use in casseroles or other dishes.
